title: hieracium froelichianum subsp. crepidodon
intro: Hieracium froelichianum subsp. crepidodon is a subspecies of the Hieracium froelichianum plant, commonly found in mountainous regions, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium froelichianum subsp. crepidodon include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
